Job Application

This form has been modified since it was saved. Please review all fields before submitting.

* indicates a required field

Steps

  1. 1. Applicant Information(current) This section is complete This section is incomplete
  2. 2. Availability / Education This section is complete This section is incomplete
  3. 3. Work History This section is complete This section is incomplete
  4. 4. References This section is complete This section is incomplete
  5. 5. Electronic Signature This section is complete This section is incomplete

  • Applicant Information

    2. PLEASE READ THE FOLLOWING INFORMATION

      DO NOT PRESS your browser's "BACK" button during the online application process. The application process will take you 15-25 minutes to complete.

      All required sections of this application must be completed in order to be considered for employment. The required sections are marked with a red asterisk(*).

      Please Note:       You may choose to start and not complete the application at any time by pressing the "save for later" link at the bottom of this application, however, you must complete the application and submit it before the deadline.
      Saving the application will not submit it to the Human Resource Department, a confirmation email will be sent to the email address you provide once you have successfully completed the application. At the end of the application process there is a EEO Voluntary Disclosure Request.


      This institution is an equal opportunity provider and employer. If you wish to file a Civil Rights program compliant of discrimination, complete the USDA Program Discrimination Compliant Form found online at http://www.ascr.usda.gov/compliant_filing_cust.html, or at any USDA office or call (866) 632-9992 to request the form.You may also write a letter containing all of the information requested in the form. Send your completed compliant form or letter to us by mail at U.S. Department of Agriculture, Director, Office Adjudication, 1400 Independence Avenue, S.W.,Washington, D.C. 20250-9410, by fax (202) 690-7442 or email program.intake@usda.gov "The City of Portland is an Equal Opportunity Provider and Employer."

    18. Have you applied with the City of Portland before?*
    20. Have you been employed with the City of Portland before?*
    22. Do you currently have relatives working for the City of Portland?*
    26. Are you 18 years of age or older?*
    28. Do you have a valid driver's license?*
    30. Do you have a legal right to work in the United States?*
    32. Have you ever been convicted of a felony?
    36. Continue

    Electronic Signature

    2. *optional

    4. Electronic Signature Agreement
      By checking the "I agree" box below, you agree and acknowledge that 1) your application will not be signed in the sense of a traditional paper document, 2) by signing in this alternate manner, you authorize your electronic signature to be valid and binding upon you to the same force and effect as a handwritten signature, and 3) you may still be required to provide a traditional signature at a later date.
